hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git\s+(add|commit)"; then staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$staged" | grep -qiE "\.(env|key|secret|pem|credentials)"; then echo "BLOCKED: refusing to stage/commit sensitive files" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); filepath=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
